svg:
Management Framework
NIST Cybersecurity Framework
Identify <narration id="identify-section" data-narration="The Identify function consists of five processes that help organizations understand their business and technology environments, identify potential risks and threats, and prioritize them.
Protect <narration id="protect-section" data-narration="The Protect function consists of five processes that help organizations implement and maintain appropriate measures to reduce cybersecurity risk and protect their assets and information systems.
Detect <narration id="detect-section" data-narration="The Detect function consists of five processes that help organizations identify and assess existing security controls and identify potential vulnerabilities and weaknesses.
Respond <narration id="respond-section" data-narration="The Respond function consists of five processes that help organizations take action in response to detected security incidents and take steps to mitigate or remediate the incident.
Recover <narration id="recover-section" data-narration="The Recover function consists of five processes that help organizations develop and implement plans to restore systems and data after a security incident, and to ensure business continuity and resilience.
